theme_and_archetype.rationale: For a distinctive frontend developer portfolio, we are adopting a Swiss Brutalist aesthetic. This breaks the generic 'Vercel/SaaS' developer portfolio mold by using extreme contrast, oversized typography, strict grids, and a single striking accent color. It communicates authority, precision, and high-end technical capability.

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-7xl lg:text-[8vw] leading-none tracking-tighter uppercase font-black
scale.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl leading-tight tracking-tight uppercase font-bold
scale.caption: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (-0.02em to -0.04em).
Use Monospace for body text to reinforce the 'developer' persona.
Overlines and small labels must be deeply tracked (0.2em) and uppercase.
Avoid standard bolding for contrast; mix 'Black' weight headings with 'Regular' monospace body.
Use aggressive padding between sections (py-32 or py-40) to create breathing room.
Containers with borders must use thick inner padding (p-8 or p-12).
Embrace asymmetry. Do not center everything. Align left tightly to the grid.
Borders: 1px to 2px solid borders for structure (border-black in light, border-white/15 in dark). Avoid soft rounded corners; use rounded-none or max rounded-sm.

patterns.hero: Full height (min-h-screen). Massive typography pushed to edges. Absolute positioned abstract textures.
patterns.bento_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-px bg-border. Children must have bg-background. This creates a hairline grid effect.

libraries: framer-motion (for scroll reveals, layout animations, hover states)
micro_interactions: Links & Buttons: Hover states should feature harsh color inversions (e.g., bg-black text-white to bg-accent text-white) rather than soft opacity fades.
Terminal Scramble Effect: Use Framer Motion or custom React hook to 'scramble' nav link text or skill tags on hover (e.g., random characters flipping to the actual word).
Project Cards: Arrow icons should translate right and up (-translate-y-1 translate-x-1) on hover.
Scroll Animations: Fade up and slight Y-translation (y: 40, opacity: 0 to 1) for section entrances, staggered for list items.

components.header: Fixed top, backdrop-blur-xl (glassmorphism rules). 1px bottom border. Left-aligned logo/name, right-aligned nav links and theme toggle.
components.buttons: Brutalist. Solid sharp rectangles. border-2 border-primary in light mode. uppercase, deeply tracked text. Hover: fill with Accent color.
components.project_card: Oversized numeric index (01, 02). Large typographic title. On hover, a clipped background image or abstract texture scales up slightly behind the text. Include an external link arrow.
components.skills_container: Marquee ribbon of skills in massive outline text (text-transparent stroke-black), OR a strict mono-spaced grid of tags.
components.contact_form: Shadcn components heavily stripped down. No border-radius. 1px solid bottom borders on inputs instead of full boxes. Giant 'LET'S TALK' heading.

hero_texture_light.description: Curved white latticework. Use as absolute background in light mode hero, low opacity (10-20%) or masked.

hero_texture_dark.description: Black and white striped textile. Use as absolute background in dark mode hero, low opacity.

profile_placeholder.description: Professional portrait for the About section.

rules: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
Use kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='theme-toggle', data-testid='project-link-1').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: framer-motion, lucide-react, react-fast-marquee, @studio-freight/lenis (or lenis).
Configure Tailwind with the specified typography fonts (Cabinet Grotesk and IBM Plex Mono). Add them via Google Fonts or custom font imports in index.css.
Implement a strict Light/Dark mode toggle. Use next-themes if using Next.js, or standard React Context for vanilla React.
Build the projects section using the exact URLs provided in the problem statement.
Avoid generic 'cards'. Use full-width rows with border-bottom or harsh bento grids for project listings.
Do not use border-radius (keep rounded-none) to maintain the brutalist/editorial aesthetic.
Ensure the hero section uses fluid typography (e.g. clamp or vw units) so 'BHUPINDER K.' dominates the screen.
